chunks.text: Course: CS 10 | EECS at UC Berkeley. CS 10. The Beauty and Joy of Computing. Catalog Description: An introductory course for students with minimal prior exposure to computer science. Prepares students for future computer science courses and empowers them to utilize programming to solve problems in their field of study. Presents an overview of the history, great principles, and transformative applications of computer science, as well as a comprehensive introduction to programming.
chunks.question: What is the title and purpose of CS 10?
chunks.answer: Introductory course for minimal prior exposure.

chunks.text: Topics include abstraction, recursion, algorithmic complexity, higher-order functions, concurrency, social implications of computing (privacy, education, algorithmic bias), and engaging research areas (data science, AI, HCI). Students will program in Snap! (a friendly graphical language) and Python, and will design and implement two projects of their choice.
chunks.question: What topics and programming languages are covered?
chunks.answer: Abstraction, social implications, Snap!, and Python.

chunks.text: Units: 4. Also Offered As: COMPSCI 10. Related Areas: Education (EDUC). Formats: Fall: 2.0 hours of lecture, 1.0 hours of discussion, and 4.0 hours of laboratory per week. Summer: 4.0 hours of lecture, 2.0 hours of discussion, and 8.0 hours of laboratory per week. Spring: 2.0 hours of lecture, 1.0 hours of discussion, and 4.0 hours of laboratory per week.
chunks.question: What are the course units and formats?
chunks.answer: 4 units with varying lecture and lab hours.

chunks.text: Grading Basis: Student Option. Final Exam Status: Yes. Class Schedule (Spring 2026): CS 10 – MoWeFr 10:00-10:59, Evans 60 – Dan Garcia. Class Notes: - Time conflicts are allowed. Links: EECS Course Archives (CalNet authentication required), CS enrollment policies, EE enrollment policies, HKN course maps.
chunks.question: What are the grading and schedule details?
chunks.answer: Student Option grading, final exam, Spring 2026 schedule.
